hero.description: Thoughtful, purposeful design that elevates brands and creates meaningful digital experiences.

cards.title: Brand Identity
cards.subtitle: Visual Strategy
cards.price: Build a brand that resonates. From logo design to complete visual systems, we create cohesive identities that tell your story and connect with your audience.

cards.title: Web & Digital
cards.subtitle: Digital Design
cards.price: Beautiful, functional websites and digital products designed with the user in mind. Every pixel serves a purpose, every interaction feels intuitive.

cards.title: Print & Editorial
cards.subtitle: Graphic Design
cards.price: From brochures to packaging, we craft print materials that demand attention and communicate your message with clarity and elegance.

about.title: About
about.description: I'm a designer who believes that great design is invisible — it just works. With a background spanning brand identity, digital products, and editorial design, I bring a holistic perspective to every project. The goal is always the same: create something that looks beautiful and works brilliantly.

contact.title: Start a Project
contact.quote: "Design is not just what it looks like. Design is how it works."

footer.description: A creative studio crafting purposeful design that connects brands with people.
